wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Battleworn Dummy.png}} {{E|Battleworn Dummy|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in {{2|Glory}}. It is a combat event. == Options == {{Frame|Setting 1}} Fight a 75 HP {{2|Battle Friend V1.0|dummy}}. {{TS|positive||Procure 1 random {{2|Potions|Potion}}.}}
{{Frame|Setting 2}} Fight a 150 HP {{2|Battle Friend V2.0|dummy}}. {{TS|positive||[[Upgrade]] 2 random cards.}}
{{Frame|Setting 3}} Fight a 300 HP {{2|Battle Friend V3.0|dummy}}. {{TS|positive||Obtain a random {{2|Relics|Relic}}.}} * You have 3 turns to defeat the dummy. Failing results in no reward. == Dialogue ==
As you approach, it begins to rumble and fizzle and lights up brilliantly! "BZZZT! TIME TO TRAIN!!! YOU HAVE 3 TURNS TO DEFEAT ME! CHOOSE A SETTING OR FACE LETHAL HUMILIATION. Here are the options:" After the terrifying message, the dummy carefully reads out detailed instructions. What do you choose?
{{Frame|Victory}}
"YOU PASS THE TRAINING! YOU ARE NOW EQUIPPED TO DEFEND THIS FACTORY AGAINST INTRUDERS!! BE SURE TO HYDRATE AFTER TRAINING SESSIONS!"
{{Frame|Defeat}}
"YOU ARE WEAK!! HUMILIATION HAS BEEN ADMINISTERED!" The dummy is silent for a moment and— "Choose a lower setting next time. Have a nice day."
[[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
